info.description: API para simulação de exames AWS com gerenciamento de usuários, exames, tentativas e estatísticas
info.title: simulacert API

tags.description: User statistics and performance analytics endpoints
tags.name: Statistics

post.description: Starts a new exam attempt for the authenticated user

403.description: Not authorized - can only start attempts for yourself

get.description: Retrieves all attempts for a specific user

403.description: Not authorized - can only view own attempts or require Admin role

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific attempt. Admin only.
Retrieves the submitted answer for a specific attempt.

delete.description: Deletes the submitted answer for a specific question within an attempt

post.description: Submits an answer for a specific question within an attempt
Cancels an ongoing exam attempt for the authenticated user
Completes an exam attempt with the final score

400.description: Invalid score value (must be between 0 and 100)

post.description: Updates/returns timer state for an attempt (keep-alive)
Pauses the server-authoritative timer for an in-progress attempt

get.description: Retrieves all questions associated with a specific attempt

post.description: Resumes the server-authoritative timer for a paused attempt

409.description: Attempt not paused or not in progress

post.description: Allows a user to retake an exam by starting a new attempt based on a previous attempt. The new attempt will have the same exam and user, but a new start time and reset score. This is useful for allowing users to retry exams while keeping a history of their attempts.

403.description: Not authorized - can only start attempts for yourself

post.description: Authenticates user and returns JWT token

get.description: Retrieves information about the currently authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new user account with USER role

400.description: Invalid input data or email already exists

post.description: Creates a new anonymous user account

get.description: Retrieves user information by email address. Admin only.
Retrieves user information by user ID

put.description: Activates a deactivated user account. Admin only.
Deactivates an active user account. Admin only.
Allows user to change their own password

get.description: Retrieves a list of all available exams

post.description: Creates a new exam. Admin only.
Upload multiple JSON files to import exams with questions

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific exam by its slug
Retrieves detailed information about a specific exam

patch.description: Updates an existing exam. Admin only.

get.description: Verifies if an exam exists by its ID

post.description: Rate and provide feedback on the quality of an AI-generated explanation
Creates a new question for an exam

get.description: Retrieves questions for a specific exam with pagination support
Retrieves detailed information about a specific question

post.description: Generate an AI explanation for why the correct answer is correct and why incorrect options are wrong. This is an experimental feature and requires the exam attempt to be completed.

400.description: Invalid request or attempt not completed

403.description: Attempt does not belong to user

post.summary: Request AI explanation for a question

post.description: Create a review for a completed attempt

400.description: Invalid request - attempt not found or validation failed

409.description: Review already exists for this attempt

get.description: Retrieve review for a specific attempt

404.description: Review not found for this attempt

get.description: Returns aggregated review metrics for a given user

403.description: Not authorized - can only view own summary or require Admin role

get.summary: Get review summary for a user

get.description: Retrieves overall statistics for a specific user

403.description: Not authorized - can only view own statistics or require Admin role

get.description: Retrieves user performance statistics grouped by AWS service domains

403.description: Not authorized - can only view own statistics or require Admin role

get.description: Retrieves the history of all attempts for a specific user

403.description: Not authorized - can only view own history or require Admin role

content.example: AWS stands for Amazon Web Services.
